auth.createUser: INSERT INTO users (name, email, password) VALUES ($1, $2, $3) RETURNING id, email, name;
auth.getUserByEmail: SELECT id, email, password, name FROM users WHERE email = $1 LIMIT 1;
auth.getUserByName: SELECT id, email, password, name FROM users WHERE LOWER(name) = LOWER($1) LIMIT 1;
auth.updateUserPasswordByEmail: UPDATE users SET password = $1 WHERE email = $2 RETURNING id, email, name;
auth.updateUserPasswordByName: UPDATE users SET password = $1 WHERE LOWER(name) = LOWER($2) RETURNING id, email, name;
